review_title: One of the best bug bounty platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I'm using Hackrate as a bounty hunter, and I found that there is a great team behind Hackrate. They validated my previous reports fast.
cons: Small number of bug bounty programs. They are using CAPEC instead of CWE, it was a bit strange for me at the first time, but it is very similar in most of the cases.

review_title: My experience with Hackrate Bug Bounty Platform
description: My overall experience is absolute positive. They have professional analysts with short response times. Also they provide decent amount of reward for the bounties, and the reputation / badge system is well designed. Also for companies, who want to know their assets are safe, this opportunity provides reasonable assurance, because of the numerous userbase will make sufficient work on the targets.
author: Kis G.
pros: I'm pleased to have the opportunity to be a part of a Hungarian BugBounty platform. During the years I spent with BB on various platforms, I can say that Hackrate has really quick response time. I'm the part of the platform for almost one year, and I can barely say, that they are constantly evolving, and the most important thing is they listen to their community, and try to establish development approaches based on the user's feedback.
cons: There are not many programs to test on, but since the platform is new, they have to find their place on the market, and I'm sure they will be flooded with clients.

description: Decent but it can't be only way to work in bug bounties. I would have to work on other platforms like intigriti, bugcrowd, etc. to sustain my income.
author: Soham G.
pros: Less Competition. Fast resolution. Amazing technical support.
cons: Low number of paid programs. Program I worked on had user issues that were not announced to researchers. So more communication with researchers would be better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Must have for any IT software company
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The implementation was fast and seamless.
cons: I could not tell any negative comment, we do not have any concern.

review_title: Hackrate is a great alternative to mainstream bug bounty platforms
author: Mark F.
pros: The Hackrate platform is easy to use and provides a great coverage to discover vulnerabilities in software. They are continuously expanding their researcher community.
cons: Nothing. Maybe it is a bit less advanced than the major bug bounty platforms, but they fully compensate this with attention and customer support.

author: Norbert B.
pros: I like the mVDP form and the JIRA integration the most, in addition to the basic features, they are useful for me.
cons: I can't really think of anything I don't like about the platform.

description: Cybersecurity should be prioritized in every company's life and it is so simple to do, especially with products like Hackrate. Worth to try!
author: Csila Z.
pros: Easy to handle, user-friendly, innovative tool.
cons: I have not experienced any quality weakness of the product.

review_title: Great product and service, smart team
author: Gergely R.
pros: Easy to use, great support, cost effective solution to improve the quality of our product.
cons: There are only few programs yet as it is a new platform.

review_title: Hackrate is a great bug bounty platform.
author: Jonathan N.
pros: They sre always helpful and quick to respond.
cons: There are not many programs yet as it is a new platform.

author: Kristof S.
pros: the pacing of the team and the feature set for value
cons: Still a small business feeling, yet it was no set back on the quality side

description: I think it is very usefull wide type of compani around the world.
author: Gergo K.
pros: The risk assessment is one of the most useful part of the software. On the other hand the vulnerability scanner is also so useful for me.
cons: In my oppinion, the sofware consists of wide range of service. That is why it can be possiable someone don’t use on of them, but I think it still makes it useful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mark S.
pros: Hackrate educational opportunities were quite useful since I started my learning path in ethical hacking. My most favorite is the capture the flag, but there are several type of other learning opportunities as well.
cons: None so far, I quite like the product as it is.

review_title: IT security vulnerability testing for all companies
description: They have a very transparent website. Their services have competitive pricing.
author: Gergely F.
pros: They have a variety of testing packages that can be customized for any company. The platform is clearly transparent.
cons: They dont have free trial option, but maybe it will change later

author: Gábor D.
pros: It was quite modern, responsive. Good way to start as a hobby .
cons: Bugfixes were slower than expected, other else was fine.

review_title: Great experience from a hacker perspective
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Amazing customer support. Very easy to submit bugs.
cons: Might be useful to enable payment via Paybal or Crypto currency
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Cemil Y.
pros: It accelerated the development process and we experienced a performance increase as a company.
cons: In general, I liked it very much, I did not have a bad experience, I recommend it to everyone.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Edina B.
pros: I found Hackrate through their blog where I read about an interesting vulnerability. Since they also provide education through integration, I can start my bug bounty career.
cons: The testing opportunities are limited because of the low number of bug bounty programs. I hope that they can extend their client base.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Harold T.
pros: We selected Hackrate as we were expecting to receive feedback from trusted and from more different resources. In case of vulnerability scanning it is critical to leverage and apply different techniques and methods instead of running an automated scan - Hackrate simply delivered it!
cons: The first project was really meeting our expectations, maybe we set too high expectations as we were expecting the majority of the vulnerabilities within one week. This took a bit longer in time but the overall timing of the project was as promised.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An ethical hacking platform with a great price-value proposal
description: The legal team of Hackrate was helpful during the whole process.
author: Zsuzsa S.
pros: They provide 3 different services that are fitting for any company size. The Hackrate Team responded promptly to the upcoming questions.
cons: They provide Jira integration, but Slack would be useful too.

review_title: Every digital business today needs cyber security experts that Hackrate can provide them with.
author: Áron K.
pros: The simple user interface, and the effectiveness of the software.
cons: There is no i would like less about Hackrate.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Gabor I.
pros: Great team with outstanding support. Great hackers as well.
cons: Nothing. Considering that the Hackrate is a a relatively new player on the market they deliver better than the competition.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
